notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **Active tab looks connected again.** The active tab is filled with the
  content-section colour and merges into the note below it — no divider line
  underneath — restoring the earlier look (and it can still be tinted with your
  accent). This reverts the 0.5.0 tab treatment. (Window Chrome & Appearance Spec.)
- The tab bar now uses the sidebar colour so the active tab stands out as the
  content surface it opens onto; removed the redundant "Active tab opacity"
  control (the tab follows your window opacity).
